claim: QL02 (Delta=-4, CM=Q(i)) confirms Stokes signal S<1 under D-QL02-B: S range [0.56,0.93]; best Painleve cell D-QL02-A + P-III residual 0.000938915; depth=1500, dps=250.
QL06 (Delta=-7, CM=Q(sqrt(-7))) confirms Stokes signal S<1 under D-QL06-B: S range [0.36,0.76]; best Painleve cell D-QL06-A + P-V residual 0.000106606; depth=1500, dps=250.
QL26 (Delta=-28, CM=Q(sqrt(-7))) confirms Stokes signal S<1 under D-QL26-B: S range [-0.32,0.39]; best Painleve cell D-QL26-A + P-III residual 0.0239777; depth=1500, dps=250.
Intra-field replication: QL06 (Delta=-7, h=1, Heegner) and QL26 (Delta=-28, non-Heegner) both in CM field Q(sqrt(-7)) confirm S<1; Heegner status is NOT the controlling variable -- CM field is.

Stokes predicate complete: Delta<0 -> S<1 across all 6 known degree-2 PCF families {QL01,QL02,QL06,Vquad,QL15,QL26}; CM fields {Q(sqrt-3), Q(i), Q(sqrt-7), Q(sqrt-11), Q(sqrt-5), Q(sqrt-7)}; all S below 1 under at least one CM-respecting deformation.
